title: phacelia ramosissima var. suffrutescens
intro: Phacelia ramosissima var. suffrutescens, also known as dwarf phacelia or suffrutescent phacelia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phacelia ramosissima var. suffrutescens include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
